channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Twitch has plenty of competition in the livestream economy. CEO Dan Clancy isn’t worried
item.description: Business leaders are often reluctant to speak about their competition. It’s rare that you’ll hear Netflix’s Ted Sarandos talk about Disney+, or Skims’s Jens Grede speak about Spanx. It’s uncouth and unhelpful, a good PR will tell you.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: La división española de Daimler Truck apuesta por la automatización robótica de procesos
item.description: La división española de Daimler Truck confía en Telefónica Empresas como partner tecnológico para evolucionar procesos internos, ahorrar costes y reducir fallos en su operativa de negocio.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Cisco researchers highlight emerging threats to AI models
item.description: Cisco security researchers this week detailed a number of threats they are seeing from bad actors trying to infect or attack AI’s most common component – the large language model.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Public cloud providers are missing the mark with AI
item.description: Microsoft’s recent earnings call painted a sobering picture. Despite the company’s aggressive push into artificial intelligence and substantial investments in infrastructure, growth numbers fell short of expectations.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: TikTok's Fate Hangs in Balance as Trump Announces Sovereign Wealth Fund | News Article
item.description: US President Donald Trump signed an executive order creating a sovereign wealth fund, which could potentially buy the short video app TikTok. The news comes as a surprise to investors and raises questions about how the fund would work.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Globe Life data breach may have affected 850,000 more patients than previously thought
item.description: Healthcare company initially said cyberattack affected 5,000 people, but stressed the number is likely bigger.
item.dc:creator: TechRadar

item.title: Bill Gates shares his thoughts on vaccine backlash, Intel's woes and Google's antitrust battle
item.description: Although Microsoft founder Bill Gates sat down for an interview with The Associated Press to discuss his new memoir, “Source Code: My Beginnings,” he also shared his views on a variety of other topics, including vaccine conspiracy views about him, his thoughts on the struggles of longtime computer c
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: SoftBank and OpenAI set up joint company to push artificial intelligence services
item.description: TOKYO (AP) — Japanese technology giant SoftBank Group and OpenAI stepped up their AI partnership Monday, setting up a 50-50 held company called SB OpenAI Japan.
item.dc:creator: YURI KAGEYAMA, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Italy blocked AI app DeepSeek in Apple and Google stores. Here’s why
item.description: The Chinese artificial intelligence app DeepSeek could not be accessed on Wednesday in Apple and Google app stores in Italy, the day after the country’s data protection authority requested information on its use of personal data.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: JavaScript Temporal to ease dates and times
item.description: Web developers will soon find it easier to work with dates and times in JavaScript, thanks to emerging browser support for JavaScript’s Temporal object, according to Mozilla.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: OpenAI unleashes o3-mini reasoning model
item.description: OpenAI on Friday released the latest model in its reasoning series, o3-mini, both in ChatGPT and its application programming interface (API). It had been in preview since December 2024.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Sam Bankman-Fried’s parents appealing to Trump to pardon their beloved son: report
item.description: The mother of Sam Bankman-Fried has apparently had a major change of heart about Trump after once leading a top Silicon Valley fundraising network for anti-Trump Democrats.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: World's first AI-designed, 3D-printed shoe wants to be the next Crocs
item.description: A startup claims to have developed the world's first entirely artificial intelligence-designed and 3D-printed shoe, the brainchild of a 25-year-old.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Italy blocks DeepSeek due to unclear data protection
item.description: Italy’s data protection authority Garante has chosen to block the app for the much-hyped Chinese AI model DeepSeek in the country.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: VMware offers fixes to severe vulnerabilities in VMware Aria
item.description: VMware has fixed multiple high-severity vulnerabilities affecting its cloud management platform (CMP), VMware Aria, which could allow attackers to steal sensitive credentials from the virtualization giant’s IT management and logging solutions.
item.dc:creator: csoonline

item.title: Opinion: AI is harming our children. California must step up
item.description: Will lawmakers again permit another addictive technology open to children and stand by as another generation gets hurt?
item.dc:creator: Robert C. Fellmeth, The Mercury News

item.title: The quantum computing reality check
item.description: In late 2024, a major pharmaceutical company invested $50 million in quantum computing initiatives through a leading cloud provider, hoping to revolutionize their drug discovery process.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft AI investments cause cloud operating income growth to plunge
item.description: Microsoft reported strong earnings on Wednesday, but growth in profits in its intelligent cloud segment is slowing despite booming demand for AI infrastructure. It reported revenue of $25.5 billion in its intelligent cloud segment, around 37% of its total revenue, in the three months to Dec.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: John Mulaney dunked on Meghan Markle and Prince Harry at star-studded Netflix event
item.description: The comedian poked fun at Meghan and Harry's Netflix track record, shortly after the duchess announced she was delaying the release of her lifestyle show in the wake of the Los Angeles wildfires.
item.dc:creator: Martha Ross, The Mercury News

item.title: How federal land could generate lots of electricity
item.description: "We estimate 10 to 20 million homes could be served from the electricity that are produced from that renewable energy," said Trieu Mai. The post How federal land could generate lots of electricity first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025
item.description: Last year was an eventful one on the cybersecurity front. But big cyber developments in the federal scape are expected in 2025. The post Cybersecurity has had its ups and downs as we head into 2025 first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network

item.title: Trump’s 100% tariff threat on Taiwan chips raises cost, supply chain fears
item.description: President Donald Trump has suggested plans to impose tariffs of up to 100% on semiconductors imported from Taiwan, aiming to boost US manufacturing but risking higher costs and supply chain disruptions for tech firms and enterprises.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: 4 tiny Docker images for lightweight containers
item.description: Docker images can get pretty bulky if you’re not careful. Your typical Docker image includes everything you need to run a particular piece of software (such as the application language’s runtime) and everything those things depend on.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Industry Exchange Cyber 2025: Tanium’s Melissa Bischoping on why autonomous is new watchword in endpoint security
item.description: Tanium product research director describes autonomous endpoint security as akin to techie “colleague” that can help cyber team keep ahead of threats.
item.dc:creator: Tom Temin, Federal News Network
